info.english_meaning: to abandonto leaveto quitto let goto renounce
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: hAniH = utsargaH iti bAlamanoramA  tyAgaH iti kzIrasvAmI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yajasva dehi dIkzasva tapastapyasva santyaja' (rA॰2.108.16) santyaja=pravraja samSabdastyAgasya paripUrRatAmAha dattasyApratyApattim
'yadidaM kzudraM sarIsfpaM grIzmahemantAByAM nityaktaM Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 15311) nityaktamapasAritamapaseDitamapatrastam
'imA ozaDayo grIzmahemantAByAM nityaktA Bavanti' (Sa0 brA0 15312) tyaktAH satyaH kzIRA BavantItyarTaH
'prArabDamuttamaguRA na parityajanti' (Bartf0 mudrA0 217) na parityajanti na vijahati na viramayanti
'yA patyA vA parityaktA' (manu0 9175) parityaktA nirAkftA pratyAdizwA
'yo DruvARi parityajya aDruvARi nizevate' (hitopa0) parityajya parihftya upekzya

prayoga.literature_text: kArSyaM yena tyajati viDinA sa tvayEvopapAdyaH
yaM yaM vApi smaranBAvaM tyajatyante kalevaram
viyoge ko Bedastyajati na jano yat
na tvAM tyajAmi Sabale nApi me'pakftam
BayaM tyajata BadraM vo hitArTaM yuDi
sahajaM karma kOnteya sadozamapi na tyajet
